title: Colymbada minoa
taxonomy: Colymbada minoa is classified as a species within the genus Colymbada, which is a group of plants in the family Asteraceae. Colymbada minoa is also known to be a part of the subfamily Carduoideae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its morphology and genetic makeup. Colymbada minoa is closely related to other species within the genus Colymbada, which are primarily found in the Mediterranean region. The classification of Colymbada minoa is subject to ongoing research and revision as new data becomes available.

benefits: Colymbada minoa, also known as Greek mountain thyme, has been found to have various health benefits due to its rich essential oil composition. preparations: Colymbada minoa is not a recognized plant species in most botanical literature.
